title: helenium autumnale var. pubescens
intro: Helenium autumnale var. pubescens, also known as the hairy sneezeweed, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to North America. Its roots and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including soothing respiratory issues, relieving digestive problems, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of helenium autumnale var. pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
